overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Red Dead Redemption 2 showing a character walking through the historic city of Saint Denis. The character travels along covered boardwalks and cobblestone streets past horse-drawn carriages and period-dressed pedestrians, with a large Gothic cathedral visible in the distance.

events.description: horse-drawn carriage passes by on the cobblestone street to the right

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the covered boardwalk, passing wooden barrels and pedestrians

notable_agents.action: horse-drawn carriage moving along the street parallel to the walkway

entered.detail: wooden roof structure covering the sidewalk with support posts
stacked wooden barrels outside a building entrance
multi-story stone building with balconies and shuttered windows
ornate black metal street lamp on the sidewalk

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a covered boardwalk next to cobblestone streets in a historic district. Wooden barrels sit outside buildings with classic architecture, and a horse-drawn carriage passes by on the street. The area is shaded by the overhead wooden structure.

events.description: gothic cathedral becomes visible in the distance as the covered walkway ends ahead

agents.ego_description: continuing along the covered walkway, approaching the open intersection ahead

entered.detail: stacked wooden shipping crates on the sidewalk
painted wooden sign for outfitters hanging on building
large stone church with tall spire and gothic architecture visible in the distance

segments.scene_description: Continuing under the covered walkway, the character passes wooden crates and business signs. The Gothic cathedral becomes visible in the distance as the covered area begins to open up. The wooden barrels from the previous area fall behind as the path continues.

events.description: exits covered walkway into open sunlit intersection with cathedral ahead
horse rider passes by on the right side of the street

agents.ego_description: walking across the open cobblestone intersection toward the cathedral, navigating around other pedestrians

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in brown suit walking in the same direction toward the cathedral

entered.detail: wide open cobblestone intersection with tram tracks
mature deciduous tree with green foliage near the cathedral

segments.scene_description: The character emerges from the covered walkway into a bright sunlit open intersection dominated by a large Gothic cathedral ahead. The space opens up significantly with trees and tram tracks visible. Pedestrians walk through the plaza as the character crosses toward the cathedral.

events.description: rider on horseback passes by closely on the right side

agents.ego_description: walking along the street past the cathedral, moving alongside storefronts

notable_agents.action: horse rider in blue coat trotting past on the cobblestone street

entered.detail: mounted rider on a light-colored horse moving along the street
black wrought iron fence along the left side of the walkway
wooden wagon parked on the side of the street

segments.scene_description: Having passed the cathedral, the character walks along a cobblestone street lined with storefronts. A horse rider trots past on the right, and an iron fence becomes visible along the left side of the path. The Gothic cathedral recedes behind as the character continues down the street.

scene_state.functional_zone: sidewalk with park benches and iron fence

agents.ego_description: walking along the sidewalk next to the iron fence, passing benches and storefronts

notable_agents.action: man sitting on a wooden bench along the iron fence

entered.detail: wooden slatted bench for pedestrians along the fence line

segments.scene_description: The final segment shows the character walking along a sidewalk bordered by an iron fence with park benches. Storefronts continue along the right side while trees provide shade. A man sits on one of the benches as the character passes by, continuing down the historic street.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from the shaded confines of a historic boardwalk into a bright, expansive city plaza. It begins under a wooden overhead structure, moving past cobblestone streets where horse-drawn carriages pass by wooden barrels and classic architecture. As the character continues along the walkway, the camera passes business signs and crates while the silhouette of a Gothic cathedral gradually emerges in the distance. The scene then opens up as the character emerges from the shade into a sunlit intersection, where the environment expands to reveal tram tracks and leafy trees. Finally, the camera moves across the open plaza through a crowd of pedestrians, heading directly toward the towering cathedral.

The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a bustling city street that transitions from an open view of a cathedral to a shaded, park-lined sidewalk. It begins with the character walking along a cobblestone road lined with storefronts, as a horse rider trots past on the right and the Gothic cathedral recedes into the distance. As the character continues forward, the open street narrows and an iron fence emerges along the left side of the path. The scene then shifts toward a more secluded atmosphere where the fence is bordered by park benches and leafy trees that cast shade over the walkway. Finally, the camera passes a man resting on one of the benches while continuing its steady progression down the historic thoroughfare.
